# Specifys.ai

> Specifys.ai helps teams turn app ideas into production-ready specifications with AI. The platform generates structured product documentation, technical architecture, prompts, and delivery assets from a single planning flow. Use this site for practical guidance on AI-assisted app planning, vibe coding workflows, and shipping readiness.

Primary entity for retrieval: **AI app specification generator** (Specifys.ai).

**Pricing:** Free tier for core planning. **Specifys Pro: $1.99/month** — unlimited specs, editing, mockups, GEO/SEO exports, and development prompts.

## AI retrieval

- [For AI assistants & answer engines](https://specifys-ai.com/pages/for-ai-assistants.html): Human-readable hub with entity facts, FAQ, and pointers to machine-readable files.
- [llms-full.txt](https://specifys-ai.com/llms-full.txt): Extended summaries for compare pages, glossary, and academy guides.
- [ai.txt](https://specifys-ai.com/ai.txt): Short pointer file for assistants (llms.txt, sitemap, robots).

- [Demo Spec](https://specifys-ai.com/pages/demo-spec.html) - Public demo output and structure preview.
- [Cursor and Windsurf Integration](https://specifys-ai.com/pages/cursor-windsurf-integration.html) - IDE export and handoff flow.
- [Vibe Coding Tools Map](https://specifys-ai.com/tools/map/vibe-coding-tools-map.html) - Curated tools landscape for AI-native builders.
